chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Good morning, what brings you in today?

chunks.speaker: patient
chunks.text: I've been getting chest pain when I climb the stairs, for about two weeks now.

chunks.speaker: patient
chunks.text: No, only when I exert myself. Sometimes I get a little shortness of breath with it.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Blood pressure is 148 over 92, heart rate 78, oxygen saturation 98 percent.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Heart sounds are normal, no murmurs. Chest is clear on auscultation.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: You have known hypertension and type 2 diabetes on the record.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Let's get an ECG and review your lipid profile, then follow up in one week.
